code:
---
title: Sequence Diagram - Mobile Biometric Authentication
config:
  theme: base
---
%% QuantumZero UML palette note: actors/external=#fff7e6/#b45309, system/component=#e0f2fe/#075985, datastore=#ecfccb/#4d7c0f, notes=#fff9c4/#d97706. Aligns diagrams to Deliverable 1 UML/DFD theme.
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  actor User as Holder
  participant UI as Flutter UI
  participant Bio as BiometricService
  participant Plugin as local_auth
  participant OS as OS Auth Prompt (Infra_LoadBalancer)

  User->>UI: Unlock wallet / access protected feature
  UI->>Bio: authenticate(Infra_IngressController)
  activate Bio
  Bio->>Plugin: authenticate(Infra_LoadBalancer)
  activate Plugin
  Plugin->>OS: Prompt user
  activate OS

  alt Authentication Success
    OS-->>Plugin: Success
    Plugin-->>Bio: true
    Bio-->>UI: true
    UI-->>User: Access granted
  else Authentication Failed/Cancelled
    OS-->>Plugin: Failure / Cancel
    Plugin-->>Bio: false
    Bio-->>UI: false
    UI-->>User: Access denied
  end

  deactivate OS
  deactivate Plugin
  deactivate Bio
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个移动端的生物识别认证流程。用户作为Holder解锁钱包时，Flutter UI层要先调用BiometricService，然后一路透传到系统的OS Auth Prompt。这里有个细节，OS层我想标注成Infra_LoadBalancer，因为底层实际走的是负载均衡后的认证节点。
明白了，那BiometricService到系统层之间需要加一个桥接吗？比如local_auth这种插件层，还是让Bio直接调用OS？另外Infra_IngressController这个标记放在哪一层合适？
对，要加local_auth作为Plugin层。Infra_IngressController放在BiometricService的authenticate调用参数里就行，表示入口控制。整个链路是：UI → Bio → Plugin → OS，每层都要activate，最后按成功和失败两个分支返回。
好的，我先把主流程画出来：User发起Unlock wallet，UI调用Bio.authenticate，参数带Infra_IngressController，Bio再调用Plugin.authenticate，参数用Infra_LoadBalancer，最后Plugin触发OS Auth Prompt。四层都加上activate。
返回路径需要区分两种情况：认证成功时OS把Success逐层返回给Plugin、Bio、UI，最后UI通知User访问已授权；失败或取消时走另一条分支，返回false，UI提示访问被拒绝。用alt块把这两个分支包起来。
alt块加好了，两个分支分别是Authentication Success和Authentication Failed/Cancelled。成功分支OS--Plugin--Bio--UI--User一路返回true和Access granted；失败分支返回false和Access denied。三层deactivate也补在end后面。
检查一下，OS Auth Prompt的标注是不是写完整了？需要体现Infra_LoadBalancer的身份，另外整个图的主题色要对齐QuantumZero的交付物规范，用base主题。
确认无误，OS Auth Prompt已经标注为Infra_LoadBalancer，标题是Mobile Biometric Authentication，配置了base主题，palette注释也加上了，actors用#fff7e6，system用#e0f2fe，跟交付物1的UML/DFD风格保持一致。
